prompt:
Fix the gtk.gtk4.theme deprecation warning that appears during nixos-rebuild. The warning says:

  The default value of gtk.gtk4.theme has changed from config.gtk.theme to null.
  You are currently using the legacy default (config.gtk.theme) because home.stateVersion is less than 26.05.
  To silence this warning and keep legacy behavior, set: gtk.gtk4.theme = config.gtk.theme;
  To adopt the new default behavior, set: gtk.gtk4.theme = null;

Find where gtk theming is configured in the home-manager modules and explicitly set gtk.gtk4.theme to adopt whichever behavior makes sense (likely null for the new default, unless there's an active GTK4 theme being used). Search the codebase for gtk theme configuration to understand the current setup before deciding.

Run the project formatter and validate the build before creating a PR.
